description_long: This humanoid robot features a conical, slightly weathered blue and white body with a black dome at the top, reminiscent of a retro-futuristic design. Its torso is barrel-shaped with ribbed, accordion-like joints at the shoulders, elbows, and knees, suggesting mechanical flexibility. The arms are robust and end in pincer-like hands, while the legs are cylindrical with visible joint segments and flat feet. The back of the robot displays prominent vertical Japanese kanji characters, adding a cultural and decorative element. The surface shows signs of wear, with scratches and scuffs, indicating use or age. The overall build is sturdy, with metallic panels and visible seams, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance.
description: A retro-futuristic humanoid robot with a conical blue and white body, black dome head, pincer hands, and Japanese kanji on its back. Its surface is metallic, worn, and industrial.
description_view_0: Front view shows the conical torso, black dome head, ribbed arms and legs, and pincer hands, with a vented chest panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow profile, ribbed arm and leg joints, and the curvature of the conical body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals large Japanese kanji characters on the back, ribbed joints, and the back of the pincer hands and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the arm and leg articulation and the curvature of the body.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hanging down, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated painted metal panels with decorative kanji and weathered paint.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; head is a smooth black dome with no eyes, mouth, or expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible rotary and hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands are pincer-like with possible gripping articulation; limbs appear moderately flexible.
